ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "affiliation" INTEGER /* Affiliation of the contributor (e.g., SUSE/Novell) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contributor was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contributor's information was last updated */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the contributor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the contributor */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the contributor */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the contributor is a bot or a human */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last date the contributor was active in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_affiliation FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project's information was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the project is released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived, deprecated) */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars the project has on platforms like GitHub */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks the project has */,
  "issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues in the project */,
  "pull_requests" INTEGER /* Number of open pull requests in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the contribution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the contribution was made */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "added_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines added */,
  "removed_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines removed */,
  "changesets" INTEGER /* Number of changesets */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contribution was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contribution's information was last updated */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message associated with the contribution */,
  "commit_sha" TEXT /* SHA hash of the commit */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch on which the contribution was made */,
  "merged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the contribution has been merged */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the contribution (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the affiliation */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the affiliation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the affiliation */,
  "is_corporate" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the affiliation is a corporate entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., maintainer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the contribution */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributors" (
  "project_contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-contributor relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor in the project (e.g., maintainer, contributor) */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor joined the project */,
  "left_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor left the project (if applicable) */,
  "contribution_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the level of contribution */,
  "last_contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contribution made by the contributor to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_affiliations" (
  "project_affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-affiliation relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliation */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the affiliation started contributing to the project */,
  "left_date" TEXT /* Date the affiliation stopped contributing to the project (if applicable) */,
  "contribution_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the level of contribution by the affiliation */,
  "last_contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contribution made by the affiliation to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_affiliations_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation_id") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_affiliations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., source code, documentation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file's information was last updated */,
  "commit_sha" TEXT /* SHA hash of the commit associated with the file */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file content (for integrity checks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_files_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment's information was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_comments_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES contribution_comments ("comment_id")
)
